key_factors: The combination of a 41.2% loss of territory and a negative military balance (-0.29) has created extreme structural vulnerability. However, the critical driver of collapse probability is the ***Coup Attempt*** shock event. With POLITICAL_INSTABILITY at 92 and INSTITUTIONAL_RESILIENCE dropping to 25, the government faces a "two-front war": external aggression and internal disintegration. The 21% drop in oil prices further strains the resource-strapped defender. While international support (55.8%) remains moderate, it cannot offset the immediate loss of domestic command and control during a coup.
